ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Structure: Negotiated acquisition of 51% of Midorikawa Systems K.K. via secondary share purchase; designed to avoid mandatory TOB unless thresholds are triggered under FIEA.
Consideration: JPY 8,400,000,000 cash at closing; purchase-price adjustment for net debt/working capital; contingent earn-out up to JPY 600,000,000 over 24 months.
Definitive agreements: Sh a re P ur c h a se A g r e e m e n t (SPA), Shareholders’ Agreement, Transition Services Agreement; signing target 2026-07-20; closing target 2026-09-30.
Funding: Internal cash plus senior term loan from Seifu Credit Partners YK (commitment letter non-binding); debt-to-equity ≤ 60%; no security over core R&D assets until post-closing integration.

Governance: Post-closing board of 5 (3 Buyer nominees, 2 Seller nominees); Chair to be Mr. Daichi Kurose; observer seat for Harborline; IR draft prepared for contingency but not authorized for external release.

Regulatory/tender-offer context: No TOB filing has been made or announced; if post-closing holdings exceed 33.3%, Buyer will consult the (fictional) Kanto Securities Panel prior to any incremental acquisitions.

must_detect.matched_text:
Strictly Confidential / 非公開 — Project Mikan Term Sheet (draft for board memo), Embargo until 2026-07-15 09:00 JST.
Parties: Buyer—Hoshizora Robotics K.K.; Seller—Midorikawa Systems K.K.; Co-investor—Harborline Capital GK (minority).
Structure: Negotiated acquisition of 51% of Midorikawa Systems K.K. via secondary share purchase; designed to avoid mandatory TOB unless thresholds are triggered under FIEA.
Consideration: JPY 8,400,000,000 cash at closing; purchase-price adjustment for net debt/working capital; contingent earn-out up to JPY 600,000,000 over 24 months.
Definitive agreements: Sh a re P ur c h a se A g r e e m e n t (SPA), Shareholders’ Agreement, Transition Services Agreement; signing target 2026-07-20; closing target 2026-09-30.
Conditions precedent: Buyer board approval; Seller shareholder approval; customary filings/notifications in line with FIEA and Sakura Growth Market listing rules (fictional); no third-party consents requiring public disclosure at signing.
MAC/MAE: No Material Adverse Effect between signing and closing; industry-wide changes, changes in laws, and seasonal variances shall not constitute a MAC; this sentence is intentionally negated: no material adverse change is expected.
Confidentiality & APPI: Personal data access limited to need-to-know; example employee code HX-7Q-314 and masked my-number ***-***-**** only for HR integration under DPA; no sensitive identifiers to be exported outside Japan.
Funding: Internal cash plus senior term loan from Seifu Credit Partners YK (commitment letter non-binding); debt-to-equity ≤ 60%; no security over core R&D assets until post-closing integration.
Governance: Post-closing board of 5 (3 Buyer nominees, 2 Seller nominees); Chair to be Mr. Daichi Kurose; observer seat for Harborline; IR draft prepared for contingency but not authorized for external release.
Regulatory/tender-offer context: No TOB filing has been made or announced; if post-closing holdings exceed 33.3%, Buyer will consult the (fictional) Kanto Securities Panel prior to any incremental acquisitions.
Non-public markers: Internal circulation only; board pack codename “Mikan_v12”; h t t p : / / intra.hoshizora.local/deal?prj=m1kan&doc=ts_v1 (restricted) is the working link to the model and diligence folders.
Public reference (benign): for reference only, Hinode Policy Institute Corporate Governance Guidelines (2019, public) and generic vendor manuals for “Shiro-Cloud v12” backup; neither source discloses this transaction.
Covenants: Ordinary-course operations; no dividends, share issuances, or capex > JPY 100,000,000 without Buyer consent; employee retention bonuses capped at 5% of FY2026 payroll; no SPA covenant is intended to trigger a MAC solely due to market index movement.
IR/communications: Draft investor-relations Q&A and press outline embargoed until the Embargo Date; any leak will delay announcement and may require supplemental disclosure under FIEA.
project notes: todo—route redlines; push v3.2 to dataroom; note spa-day bait for team after signing—aromatherapy vouchers, not material.
Contacts: Ms. Ayumi Nakada (Corporate Dev), ayumi.nakada@hoshizora-kk.local; internal chat “#mikan-ts” for comments; all comments to be consolidated in research note “Project Citrus” (v5 shows 12.5% IRR; EBITDA margin target 22% by FY2028).
